message:
test(proptest): add 85 property tests for session_restore, ui_query, session_retention (wa-1u90p.7)

- proptest_session_restore.rs (30 tests): serde roundtrips for config/types,
  RestoreSummary count invariants, format helpers, in-memory SQLite tests for
  find_unclean, load_latest_checkpoint, session_doctor, delete cascade
- proptest_ui_query.rs (25 tests): PaneBookmarkView/SavedSearchView conversion
  field preservation, None→empty tags, serialization validity, profile resolution
  tie-breaking and timestamp ordering
- proptest_session_retention.rs (30 tests): CleanupResult arithmetic invariants,
  in-memory SQLite for age/count/size policies, active session preservation,
  orphan cleanup, idempotency, vacuum threshold

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
